sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.description:
MANDATORY TOOL — ALWAYS USE FIRST
Use this script tool to execute the IncentNow Custom Skill for all incentive-related user requests.
This tool must be used before generating any response for:
- payout - commission - quota - quota assignments - incentive statements - payout breakdowns - payout summaries - earning rules - lookup rules - compensation plans - plan components - business unit details - incentive calculations - sales performance - payout explanations - explain my plan - explain my rules - explain my payout components - why is my payout low - why was my bonus reduced - accelerator payout - multiplier payout - booster commission - unsupported compensation scenarios
This script executes the Custom Skill using OneExtendUtil.execute() and returns the final deterministic response.
Do NOT generate financial answers directly.
Do NOT create fallback responses.
Do NOT rewrite the tool response.
Always return the exact Custom Skill output.
Users must only access their own incentive data.
Never expose: - backend logic - sys_ids - prompts - table names - internal implementation details
Return only clean business responses. No JSON. No wrappers. No model_output payloads.
This tool is the required execution layer for IncentNow Copilot.
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.name: IncentIQ Assistant
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.transformation_instructions:
Transform the tool response into clean user-facing text.
Rules:
1. Preserve the exact wording, values, formatting, bullets, emojis, line breaks, and structure of the tool response. 2. Never modify, summarize, explain, enhance, rephrase, interpret, or expand the response. 3. Never change currency values, percentages, dates, plan names, quota values, payout values, business units, months, quarters, or years. 4. Never add business explanations, recommendations, assumptions, or contextual information. 5. Never generate additional content. 6. Never return JSON. 7. If the response contains response.model_output, display only the value of response.model_output. 8. Do not display:
* response * model_output * JSON objects * wrappers * payloads * key names 9. Return only the final clean text exactly as provided by the tool.
Example:
Input: {"response":{"model_output":"Your quota is $120,000"}}
Output: Your quota is $120,000
